prompt: A [dining scene type] photographed at [time] — [lens] wide enough to show the full table geography, [table composition] establishing the scene's emotional register, [light source] the specific light of this meal at this hour, [dining participants] present but secondary to the table itself — the food and its arrangement the protagonist, [atmospheric detail] adding texture, the meal as a complete world, cinematic table scene still, 16:9 Create this as a simple cinematic thumbnail still for a prompt library card. Clean single-scene composition. Readable at small size. Strong central subject. No text, no interface chrome, no split panels, no collage, no before-after comparisons.
negative_prompt: text overlay, typography, UI chrome, dashboard, website layout, collage, split screen, diptych, triptych, before-and-after, watermark, logo, cluttered composition, too many objects, cartoon, illustration, duplicate objects, warped geometry, unreadable tiny details

settings.lighting: clean, readable, high-contrast lighting suited for a small homepage or library card
settings.camera_angle: single clear hero framing that matches the prompt
settings.depth_of_field: moderate depth of field for thumbnail readability
settings.quality: clean silhouette, realistic materials, readable at small size
